_meta.name: English
_meta._note: English locale — culturally adapted for NYC/Brooklyn founder context. Marina = Brooklyn, Chase bank, IRS 1099 freeze, Hinge, Bushwick. Translated from ru.json (source of truth).

error.pain_required: write what's burning. up to 500 chars.
error.session_short: session too short. wait a bit longer.
error.delivery_failed: didn't send. try again in a minute.
error.rate_limit: too many tries. try again in an hour.
error.bad_data: something's off with the data. check your @handle.
error.cors_blocked: blocked by cors. dm tim directly.

empty.team: team not assembled yet · keep chasing clients
empty.money: only the bank in «money» so far
empty.spam: quiet for now · spam hasn't hit yet

outgoing: sending cold outreach. 20 addresses. linkedin + email
farming twitter: people complaining about agencies
digging through wellfound, writing cold looms
hit_reply: «interesting, let's jump on a call tomorrow at 2pm»
«we're actually launching a new product, dm me»
«i don't decide, but i'll pass it to my colleague — she'll reach out»
«could chat, i have 15 min on thursday»
miss_silence: mod deleted the post in the slack

work: writing landing page. h1, sub, 3 pain blocks
eating revisions. third round. half the same as last time
on a call with client: «what hurts the most right now?»
going through yesterday's feedback, rewriting headline
brief: checking activity: do they even have a product right now
testing fit: «if this doesn't click in a week — then what?»
rest: poured coffee, let water cool. staring out the window
on the fire escape. standing like i smoke, don't smoke
lay down for 20 min with the phone
walked to the bodega for bread
put the kettle on, forgot, put it on again
eat_home: mac & cheese. not a restaurant, but at least something hot
oatmeal with a pat of butter. grandma logic. works
three-egg scramble. coffee. staring at the wall
eating yogurt with banana straight from the cup. too tired for a bowl
freezing half the trader joe's lasagna. it's fine
eat_out: picked up salmon bowl + coffee from a café · dopamine hit
slipped into a bistro around the corner. carbonara. solo at the window seat
restaurant overlooking the river. steak, glass of wine. feel half-human again
dim sum spot in the food hall. alone, with a book. quiet and good
discounted sushi set via promo code. sad-girl romantic but filling
shopping: bought a cozy sweater at uniqlo. small thing, mood +50
new sneakers on sale. in them i feel i could run faster (i won't)
that dress i'd been eyeing. still not my size, but owned. joy
sephora haul. eyeshadow palette and lipstick. painting my face tomorrow
moleskine + thermal mug. the work kit is refreshed
work_night: up till 4am · screen burning eyes · project is moving
third steep of tea, laptop fan on max, neighbors asleep
blue dawn in the window. i haven't slept. but work is almost done
2am snack attack: almonds, ramen, tea. hit save 47 times
headphones, lofi hip hop, hands on autopilot. 3:47am
date_kirill: date with Chris · sad dinner, but he's paying
with Chris at a café. he's talking crypto trading. i nod and eat salad
with Chris at a bar. he ordered a cocktail with an umbrella. steak for me. fine
dinner with Chris. he tries to hold my hand. i don't pull away. weird and warm
Chris took me to a movie and a café after. even walked me to the subway. maybe he's not that bad
hangout_denis: with Denis on the waterfront · wine, laughter, east river, 4 hours felt like 40 min
house party at Denis's. acoustic guitar, wine, 12 people, i laughed till i cried
prospect park with Denis. bikes, kombucha, BBQ, sunset
club with Denis. hot, loud, overpriced, but i danced three hours straight
hamptons sailing trip. wind, salt spray, Denis at the helm, i laughed like a kid

hungry: slept through the alarm. stomach burning — three days on coffee and ramen
woke up craving real meat. actual, not soy. nothing in the fridge
head spins when i stand. i need to eat real food or i don't make it
forgot my own name for a couple seconds. is that normal? is that hunger?
morning. sitting in the kitchen, staring at an empty fridge, planning a $10 grocery run
tired: alarm at 8:30. at 10:45 still in bed. arms like jelly
woke up feeling like i ran a marathon in a dream. done nothing all week
third steep of coffee. eyes closing on their own. i need a silent day and don't have one
someone drained me. physically. lying here, staring at the ceiling, counting cracks
how long can you wake up tired. this isn't fatigue anymore — it's a metamorphosis
sad: woke up at 5am for no reason. everything's quiet and i'm sad and i don't know why
want to call mum and can't. don't know what to say besides «it's all bad»
reading my old posts and not recognizing the girl who wrote them. when did i become this
crying in the shower. nothing happened. just piled up
morning. looking in the mirror. who is this person. seriously
fine: woke up before the alarm. what kind of magic trick
coffee, sun in the window, three thoughts in my head instead of a hundred. rare morning
feel alive today. thanks to last night's dinner
one of those mornings when i can
today's going to work. i can feel it
hangover: woke up at 11. head like concrete. coffee doesn't help. price of working nights
alarm at 8. laptop still warm from last night. i'm cold. hands won't listen
half the night working, half staring at the ceiling. net: half a day gone
sunrise. screen blinding. fell asleep at the laptop. neck hurts, back hurts, everything hurts

work_hungry: trying to write. letters blur. when did i last eat?
editing. re-reading the same sentence three times. brain's offline
work moving at half speed. stomach rumbling like a truck
sitting, staring at the screen. thoughts won't land. need to eat

reach_narrative: opened the laptop · inbox already has a reply from one of the background cold messages. Tim's AI bot worked overnight
went to bed — inbox empty. woke up — three replies. one real, two seen. don't get how this works, but it works
Tim's bot sent 20 cold messages while i slept. one replied. i'm just drinking coffee and reading. it's strange
notification at 7:12am: «new lead». AI did its job. i don't even know what to reply — i'll look later
waking up in a world where my cold outreach runs without me. don't know where this leads, but for now it works
brief_narrative: Tim's AI ran the call for me. sent the transcript: client is sane, budget $200+, needs a landing page. qualified lead
opening AI transcript: «client said, i want to launch in a week, ready to pay». qualified. i didn't even speak to him
bot closed the first contact on discovery, straight to qualified. read the pipeline notes and realized i don't have to call
AI caller: 23 minutes, 4 follow-ups, closed to next step. in that time i managed to drink coffee and stare out the window
first time in my life someone ran a call for me. strange mix of gratitude and a little guilt
offer_narrative: AI sent the offer and negotiated. client agreed on upfront. just read the thread — decent negotiation, didn't over-push
notification: «contract signed». AI did everything. upfront already in the bank. checking three times, can't believe it
bot sent the proposal, client agreed in 4 hours. i was walking at that moment. money arrived on its own
AI haggling: started at $280, client pushed back, AI countered $240, accepted. i would've caved
the whole funnel runs without me. first contact → discovery → offer → upfront. all that's left is to do the project. scary and freeing at the same time

callback.pavel_delay: hey. tight on cash. another week or two.
callback.bank_115_lock: Your account is TEMPORARILY UNDER REVIEW. A large crypto deposit was flagged as unverified 1099 contractor income. Transactions paused pending IRS clearance.
callback.bank_lock_note: 🔒 account frozen · 6 days · can't spend money
callback.kirill_free_dinner: hey. wanna grab dinner tonight? on me, you bring nothing
callback.khozyaika_fine_meters: I warned you about the utility readings. $100 fine deducted. Please be responsible.
callback.khozyaika_water_fine_msg: Marina, deadline passed. No water readings received. $100 fine deducted from the deposit. Very disappointed.
callback.khozyaika_electric_fine_msg: Waited three days for the electric reading. $80 fine. And please do check that kitchen outlet.
callback.khozyaika_chain_fine_msg: You didn't forward the message. I warned you about karma. Don't be surprised now.
callback.sosed_retry: where are you? i've been waiting a full day. the stain is bigger.

bank_unlock.msg: Review complete. Thanks for your patience. Transactions available.

lead_form.tim_message:
read it. thanks for being real.

three things for tomorrow morning:
1. sort the inbox into the funnel (cold / qualified / in progress / shipped)
2. cut one dead task — the one you've been putting off for four days
3. block two hours with no chat, one thing only

i'll drop templates — you'll see the effect.
lead_form.bank_memo: Tim dropped templates · payment from a client who'd been waiting

anna_referral_choice.decline_outgoing: Anna, not right now. can't handle a second one in parallel.
anna_referral_choice.decline_reply: got it, take care. i'll find someone else.

tim_creator.thanks: thanks! see you in the channel.

hero.tagline: a text game inside a messenger about a founder's first month. 12 days, $500 in the account, three projects to close — or rent eats it all.

gallery.alt_1: Marina staring at her phone · night
gallery.alt_3: Marina by the window · city at night
gallery.caption_3: tomorrow is the last day of the month

about.heading: what's going on here
about.p1_html: Marina just quit her agency job. Three years writing brand copy, running clients. Two weeks ago she decided: i'll try this on my own. Rented a studio in Bushwick. Told her parents «i'm fine». Opened the laptop.
about.p2: Nothing is happening. Inbox empty. No one writes. Battery at 20%.
about.p3_html: She has 12 days and $500 in the account. She needs to close 3 projects by end of month — or rent eats everything.
about.p4_html: Messages land in the «Teledram» messenger. Lucy cheers her on. Anna offers a gig. Tim writes from Kaş. An unhinged landlady threatens a rent hike. Mum asks for meds money. The ex — wants to borrow «for a couple weeks». Denis is inviting her to a sailing trip. You have 8 hours a day. What will you get done?

messenger.title: messenger as UI
messenger.desc: everything in chats. no menus, no tables. just messages.

contacts.title: 24 contacts
contacts.desc: 7 key, 6 recurring spammers, 7 one-shots. each with their own tone.

economy.title: real-time economy
economy.desc: hours, energy, money, hunger, comfort. every choice costs a resource.

love.title: love arc
love.desc: Chris isn't just a Hinge match. 8 beats, conflict, resolution, possible love ending.

night.title: night shift
night.desc: after the 8-hour day you can work at night. +progress, −comfort, 20% bug risk, hangover in the morning.

funnel.title: sales funnel
funnel.desc: reach_out → discovery → offer → work. Tim sells AI-automation in tiers.

chars.heading: who writes to Marina
chars.lena_desc: cheers her on. writes first. sends client leads.
chars.anna_desc: two-pager for $200 upfront + $250 on delivery. deadline day 15.
chars.tim_desc: 3 tiers of AI-automation: lead farming / discovery calls / offers.
chars.khozyaika_desc: through day 12 — absurd demands. then — suddenly waives the rent.
chars.kirill_desc: persistent. can turn into a love ending if you play it on trust.
chars.pavel_desc: asks for $300. flirts. sends memory-lane DMs at night.
chars.denis_desc: invites to Hamptons trips, rooftops, yacht days. $200-350 a night, but +60 energy.
chars.mama_desc: calls about meds. invites for Sunday roast. doesn't compare. almost.

faq.heading: frequently asked
faq.q1: how long does a playthrough take?
faq.a1: 30 in-game days ≈ 20-25 real minutes. You can stop anytime — autosave.
faq.a2: Yes. Run out of money (<-$1500), don't eat for 4 days (hunger=0), or comfort near zero after day 15 — the game can end. Odds aren't 100%, but real.
faq.q3: it's a lead magnet — then what?
faq.a3: On day 28, Tim (the real Tim Zinin) writes from inside the game. You can fill out a form and get a personal AI audit.
faq.a4: Because a founder lives in chats. Email, slack, telegram, discord — all through the messenger. The game is about right now.
faq.a5: It runs in the browser on any device. On desktop — keyboard shortcuts (1-9 for actions, Space = end of day).
faq.a6: Yes. Open source (MPL-2.0), fork of A Dark Room. No microtransactions or subscriptions.

lena_intro.message:
hey babe. heard you quit the agency.

first week is always the worst — been there. in a couple days i'll send some leads. hang in there.

anna_offer.intro:
hi. Lucy told me about you.

i have a small project — a two-pager, $200 upfront + $250 on delivery. 6 days. if you're quick — we good?

anna_referral.intro: marina, hi. loved what you made. i have a second one — email sequence for another client. $350 upfront + $450 on delivery. 7 days. in?
anna_referral.scratch_cue: Anna with a new project · open chat
anna_referral.chip_take: take the second project ($350 upfront + $450 final, 7 days)

lena_day9.message: how are you holding up? scrolling the news — sending hugs. i'll forward a couple of contacts in the next few days if i find something solid.

tim_consult_intro.msg1: hey marina. Lucy told me about you. i'm an AI automation consultant.
tim_consult_intro.msg2: here's the thing: i can plug AI into your client-hunting process. you pay once, and i set up a system that finds clients for you while you sleep.
tim_consult_intro.msg3: tier one — cold-outreach auto-farming. $200. +1 lead every day without you lifting a finger. want to try?
tim_consult_intro.scratch_cue: Tim is pitching automation · open chat

tim_tier2_offer.message: seeing your system run. now i can automate discovery calls — AI handles the brief for you. $300. +1 qualified lead per day.

tim_tier3_offer.message: tier three: AI sends offers itself and negotiates on a basic strategy. $400. +1 offer sent per day.

tim_creator_fired.msg1: Hey. Thanks so much for playing my game.
tim_creator_fired.msg2: I'm not just a character — I'm the creator. And yes, I actually do AI automation in real life.
tim_creator_fired.msg3: If you enjoyed the game — please like it, follow me on socials, share with friends.
tim_creator_fired.msg4: And if you or someone you know needs automation for their business — well, you know who to reach out to 😉
tim_creator_fired.msg5: Good luck. Almost at the end of the month. Follow me on Telegram — button below 👇
tim_creator_fired.scratch_cue: ❕ message from Tim (the real one) · open chat

khozyaika_day1_rent.msg1: Marina, good afternoon! Just a reminder: rent is $500 on the 1st of every ten-day block — the 10th, 20th, and 30th. Congrats on a new chapter!
khozyaika_day1_rent.msg2: And if there's any delay — let me know. I'll come with keys and my own handyman. He has a temper.

khozyaika_day2_komod.msg1: Marina, i had a dream last night that you scratched the dresser in the hallway. That dresser is from my grandfather, handmade, 60 years old. I treasure it.
khozyaika_day2_komod.msg2: Nothing to worry about, of course, just — please check it. And send me a photo. I'm anxious.

khozyaika_1_water.message: Marina, good afternoon! Don't forget to send hot and cold water meter readings by the 10th. IMPORTANT: must include a certified-sample photo. Otherwise $100 fine. Dagmar.
khozyaika_1_water.scratch_cue: landlady demands meter readings · open chat · deadline +3 days

khozyaika_2_tiktok.message: Marina dear, I filmed a tiktok with our building. Could you like it and follow @dagmar_cosmic_home? It matters to me as a Sagittarius — I'm on a Saturn transit and home is my anchor.

khozyaika_3_cat.message: SOS MARINA! My cat Whiskers ran out of the apartment on the 8th floor. Please help put up flyers around the block, you work from home, right? You have time. Urgently please.
khozyaika_3_cat.scratch_cue: landlady lost her cat · open chat

khozyaika_4_horoscope.message: Marina, I read your horoscope for the month. Scorpios are on fire this month. Do NOT lend money to Libras (especially Libras in glasses). This matters for the karma of the home, I worry like you're family.

khozyaika_rescue.msg1: Marina, good afternoon. I need to tell you something important and strange.
khozyaika_rescue.msg2: Last night before bed I was watching a blogger from Bali — she was talking about home karma. And you know what? She said if a landlady helps a young female founder in her first month — her third eye opens. And I need mine open, I've already asked the psychic on Avenue A about my future.
khozyaika_rescue.msg3: Bottom line. Rent for the first half of the month — I'm forgiving it. Refunded back to you. For the rest of the month — live peacefully, focus on the work. I have higher tasks, don't let me down — my third eye is on the line.
khozyaika_rescue.bank_memo: rent refund from landlady · home karma

pavel_intro.message: listen, i'm in a rough spot — need $300 for a couple weeks. i'll pay back $450, swear. help me out, please.
pavel_intro.scratch_cue: ex is asking for money · open chat

pavel_day5.msg1: remembered that time we sat by the Gowanus canal. you remember?
pavel_day5.msg2: you were 23, i was 27. i was an idiot and didn't get anything. sorry, if anything.

pavel_day7.message: listen, are you alone right now? in life, i mean.

pavel_day9.message: marina, honestly — i've been thinking about you every day for weeks. i know you don't want this. but you need to hear it.

pavel_d13.message: marina i walked past your building yesterday. just passing through. thought about the rooftop we used to climb in may 2022. remember?

pavel_d17.message: listen. what if i'm serious. let's just grab coffee. no money talk, no history. like old friends.
pavel_d17.scratch_cue: Paul is asking for coffee · open chat

pavel_d21.message: marin, heard you've got someone new. maybe it's a bad idea? you know me better.

pavel_d25.message: alright then. good luck. i was always around when things were hard. remember that.

khozyaika_d22.message: Marina, I had a dream last night about a house spirit in the form of a cat appearing in our entryway. Whiskers has been sitting on the windowsill staring at one spot for three days. Mind if I stop by with my priest to bless the apartment?

khozyaika_d27.message: Marina, next week there's a full moon in Cancer. Dressers are especially vulnerable during this time. Please don't put hot mugs on it and don't play chinese mantras nearby. Actually, best to leave the apartment between 11pm and 1am.

olya_retry.message: Marina honey, how are you? I have an update from our club — we're launching a NEW level. Only $400, but you get three times more activations. Think about it, I believe in you!
olya_retry.scratch_cue: Lily is writing again · open chat

olya_final.message: Marina, I get that you're skeptical. But here's a screenshot of my monthly income: $3200 net. And that's not the ceiling. Final offer: $150, you come in on the free tier and start earning.

krypta_retry.message: BRO yooo you alive? look SOLANA x3 this week i told you! got 1 slot left. $50 min, next week $500. don't miss it
krypta_retry.scratch_cue: crypto bro writing again · open chat

krypta_final.message: sis, real talk. i didn't have $100. went to hosting for my blog. but tomorrow for real we're going to the moon. sorry sis. not again. $30?

mama_d20.message: sweetie, the neighbor asked what kind of business you run. i said you're creative, you write things. she says that's great. her daughter has the same business but gets a salary at the DMV. but i'm not comparing.

denis_d22.message: marin, heard about you from friends. we're proud. hang in there. btw — sailing trip this weekend, come.

nastya_d6.msg1: hey! i'm Nadia, also a freelancer, we were in the same slack i think. just wanted to ask — how are you handling the first weeks without an office?
nastya_d6.msg2: i get full-on panic every morning. but i started writing three tasks a day instead of ten. it helps.

nastya_d11.message: ooo i closed a second project today. feel like a goddess. and falling asleep standing up. how's it going on your end?

nastya_d16.message: hey, i've been thinking. we should team up. alone is okay but two of us move faster. coffee soon?

nastya_d20.message: i've got a project for two, client is big. i can give you half. $200 upfront right now + $200 on delivery in a week. just deliver well. interested?
nastya_d20.scratch_cue: Nadia is offering a partnership · open chat

nastya_d25.message: marin, i'm seriously thinking about partnering up. let's meet after the month is over. i have a plan.

nastya_d30.message: you made it. i'm proud. let's meet sunday, i'll bring wine and a plan for next month.

gossip: marin! you won't BELIEVE this. Lauren from work is dating THAT guy! remember the one who was married to Natalie who's on maternity? the one who does yoga at the studio where my pilates coach now works? so THAT Natalie — she's pregnant with her SECOND by her new guy who was on my tinder 2 years ago! marina this is a catastrophe i don't know who to call. call me back right now please ONLY YOU CAN I TELL 😭

marina you won't believe what happened yesterday. i went to this gallery opening and met THAT Oliver, remember we sat with him at Kirsten's birthday and he said he had a startup? so TURNS OUT he drives for uber, and the startup is that he sells hookahs online. hookahs karl. and while he was explaining the hookahs HE KISSED ME i'm in shock

listen i've got drama. i slept with Anton — remember he introduced us at that house party in december? the yoga guru who's actually an accountant at adidas. so. i found out he has a GIRLFRIEND and she's in italy right now and we were seeing each other all week and he TOLD me he's single and i FEEL like i ruined a relationship. marina what do i do call her??

you SITTING down? marin-dear my aunt found out that my cousin divorced Karina because she cheated on him with their NEIGHBOR! karl! the neighbor! whose cat lives with them while he travels for work! so for three straight years while she was cheating they had this whole schedule when the cat comes in and out!!! this is the end of the world tell me it is!!

marina i did a tarot reading last night and i pulled the tower card in the near-future position i'm panicking what does this mean?? i googled all night they say it's a breakup with someone i haven't even met yet how do i prepare for that?? i'm panicking i bought new lipstick but it's not helping

mama6.message: sweetie, i can't save up for meds this month. if you can help — send $200. if not — i understand, you've got enough on your plate.

mama17.message: you alive out there? no calls for a week. i made an apple pie, come over saturday.

mama24.message: sweetie, i miss you. call when you can. even 5 minutes.

mama_final.message: sweetie. i haven't known how you are this whole time. tomorrow is the last day of the month. i'll just say: i'm proud of you. no matter what. call when you can.

kirill_love1.msg1: listen, been thinking. i know this sounds weird, but i like you outside of the dinners too.
kirill_love1.msg2: you've got something in your eyes — like you're fighting a dragon and not telling anyone. i see it. and i just want to sit next to you.
kirill_love1.scratch_cue: Chris sent something strange · open chat

kirill_love2.msg1: marin, let's meet up. not for dinner. just walk a bit, i want to talk to you.
kirill_love2.msg2: no plan, no reason. just want to be next to you for a couple hours. cool?
kirill_love2.scratch_cue: Chris is asking with no occasion · open chat

kirill_love_final.msg1: marina. these past weeks i figured one thing out.
kirill_love_final.msg2: you're not easy. you're not an angel. sometimes you're tired and angry. but when you talk about your work — there's fire in your voice. and i want to be the one who listens to that fire when you come home.
kirill_love_final.msg3: i'm not asking you to move in. not asking for promises. just asking permission. to be here.
kirill_love_final.marina_journal1: i did not see this coming. at all. from him, from me, from this month.
kirill_love_final.marina_journal2: i think i fell in love. and the weirdest part — i'm not scared.

day3.text: marin, sick of being home. sailing trip saturday? ocean, wind, zero emails

day6.text: hey, grab coffee? found a new spot on the corner, you'll love it. one hour, no more

day9.text: stop working for a day. let's walk the waterfront? i'll bring wine

day15.text: marina, hamptons yacht saturday. 5 people, evening. there's a spot for you

day27.text: new year in 3 days. house party at mine, don't miss it

denis.scratch_cue: Denis is inviting you out · open chat

olya_intro.msg1: Marina dear hiiii! It's Lily, we went to high school together. Class of '18. Remember me?
olya_intro.msg2: I have a unique opportunity for women who want to change their life and finances. Can I tell you about it in 5 minutes?
olya_intro.msg3: It's not a pyramid, it's a club ✨ investment of only $200, returns 3x in 2 months guaranteed
olya_intro.scratch_cue: high school classmate writing · open chat

kirill_scene11.variant_had_date: you were off yesterday at dinner. said «i'm fine» three times. that usually means the opposite. not pushing — just, if anything, i'm here.
kirill_scene11.variant_no_date: hey. know you're buried in work. not disappearing, just want you to know: i'm here. how are you actually?

kirill_scene13.trust_msg1: going to show you something. i've been writing in notebooks since i was 17, never showed anyone. this is page 47 from last year.
kirill_scene13.trust_msg2:
«everything real is quiet. and when i find her, i'll know her by the silence.»

i wrote that when i was 28. won't tell you why i'm showing you.
kirill_scene13.light_msg: listen, tell me when you can breathe for an hour. i'll be at the café on Bedford Ave — good coffee, quiet. no obligations.

kirill_conflict16.msg1: marina. heard Paul — your ex — is writing you. not asking details, just — tell me straight: is he in your life right now or not?
kirill_conflict16.msg2: if you're going back there — tell me now. i won't get in the way.

kirill_resolution19.msg1: sorry about the question about Paul. i had no right. just got scared i was losing you before i knew you.
kirill_resolution19.msg2: i'm learning to trust. slowly, but learning.

kirill_prefinale24.message: in a week this first month of yours ends. you'll be tired, i know. i just want to say — i don't care if you ship three projects or one. i'm with you.

kirill_food_delivery.msg1: not answering, not going out. i know, you're deep in it. left a bag at your door — chicken soup from the deli, two bagels, baklava. eat, ok? i'm not coming in.
kirill_food_delivery.msg2: when you can — text that you ate it. for my own peace of mind.
kirill_food_delivery.scratch_cue: 🥡 Chris left dinner at your door · +100 hunger · +100 comfort

kirill_intro.msg2: i liked you on hinge three weeks ago. you were quiet. i'm persistent
kirill_intro.msg3: maybe we meet up? dinner's on me. your pick of place

krypta_intro.msg2: SOLANA TO THE MOON 🚀🚀🚀 1000X THIS MONTH
krypta_intro.msg3: you send $100 to the wallet — you make $100000. verified. catching this one moment. decide fast
krypta_intro.scratch_cue: some crypto bro is writing · open chat

artur.msg1: marina hey. i get we didn't end on the best note
artur.msg2: but i've got something. drop by the old office tomorrow at 10, i'll explain in person. mutually beneficial

vera.msg1: Marina, hello! This is Ms. Brooks, your high school English teacher.
vera.msg2: I saw on Facebook that you started your own business. So proud of you! I have a granddaughter, Alice. She writes poetry. Could you help her grow an audience online?

sosed_intro.msg1: hello. this is your downstairs neighbor, apt 2B
sosed_intro.msg2: there's a stain on my ceiling. i think it's from you. come down and talk?

lyuda: Linda, you forgot your pie in my oven 🥧
I don't know what to do with it. It's been there 4 hours. Is it still alive?
ozon: Hi! Your order "Telescopic 3-in-1 Premium Mop" is out for delivery
When's a good time? Is the address correct?
taxi: hi this is your driver. you rode from the airport on wednesday
you left a book in my car, «atlas shrugged» vol 2
i can return it for $5 like we agreed
student: hi. i'm writing my thesis on post-positivism
can i ask 12 questions? takes 5 minutes
first question: do you think consciousness is computation?
katya: Marin, do you happen to know where to rent a pony for a day?
Little Mikey's birthday is saturday. Needs to be alive, saddle is okay
teshcha: So what, you thought I wouldn't find out??
Stacy told me everything. I'm not going to make a scene
Come over saturday — we'll talk like adults. I'm still your mother-in-law
marathon: ARE YOU READY TO BREAK THROUGH??? 🔥🔥🔥
«AWAKEN YOUR POWER» marathon · 21 days · free · today only
🌸 a real woman doesn't work — she attracts 🌸

drain_charger.marina_note: charger died. mid-work. new one — $60. can't do without.

drain_phone.marina_note: dropped the phone. screen is a spiderweb. no phone = no clients. repair $80.

drain_dentist.marina_note: tooth. woke up at 5am in pain. dentist $150, no options. half a day gone.

drain_electric.marina_note: electric + internet bill dropped. $100. autopay. nothing to do.

khozyaika_day3_noise.message: Marina, neighbors from the first floor complained about noise. Are you working past 11pm? Please type more quietly on the keyboard. Our building is from 1978, thin walls. I'm serious.

khozyaika_day5_electric.message: Marina, are you sending the electric meter reading today? I pay for your electricity, I need to know how much. Send a photo. Also: why does the kitchen outlet smell? Have you been plugging in anything besides the kettle?

khozyaika_day7_damage.msg1: Marina, I was over while you were out. Found a SCRATCH on the hallway linoleum. Was this before you or after? I need it for insurance.
khozyaika_day7_damage.msg2: Also — the bathroom faucet is leaking. Call a plumber yourself, $50 service call. I'm not obligated.
khozyaika_day7_damage.system_line: 🔧 −$50 · landlady made you call a plumber

khozyaika_day9_chain.message: Marina, this is VERY IMPORTANT. Forward this message to five people: «an apartment where a female founder lives accumulates bad karma if gratitude energy isn't circulated». My psychic-astrologer told me. She used to work for FEMA.

khozyaika_post12.flowers: Marina sweetie, hope you ate today. 🌸 I baked a cabbage pie yesterday, was thinking about you. Whiskers is purring too — she can feel you're a good person. Hang in there, honey!
khozyaika_post12.quote1: Marina, saw a motivational post: «A strong woman isn't one who doesn't cry, but one who cries and does it anyway». That's you. 💪🌸 You'll make it through, I can feel it.
khozyaika_post12.quote2: Marina dear, how are things? I lit a candle for you at church. Not for the apartment — for you personally. Whiskers sends regards 🐱 P.S. the dresser is fine, don't worry.

kirill_day29_morning.msg1: good morning. fresh coffee on the counter. left quietly, didn't want to wake you.
kirill_day29_morning.msg2: thanks for last night. rare to feel that calm.
kirill_day29_morning.msg3: if anything — i'm here. no pressure. just here.

mama_money.reason: account is in the red. it only gets harder from here.
mama_money.body: you're at minus $800. a couple more days — and there's no money for bread. who do you call?
mama_money.mama_msg: honey, sent $700. no arguments. eat, rest. love you.
mama_money.scratch_note: 💌 Mum sent $700 + 20 comfort · back in business

hospital.reason: four days without real food. head is spinning.
hospital.body: the landlady saw you leaning on the wall in the lobby. called 911. you're in the ER staring at a $3500 bill. who do you call?
hospital.mama_msg: i'm here. don't say a word. eat the soup. then sleep. landlady did right calling.
hospital.scratch_note: 🏥 Mum with soup + 80 fullness + 25 comfort · day lost

lena_breakdown.reason: nerves snapping. you sit down and can't start anything.
lena_breakdown.body: if you don't pause now — it gets worse. who do you call?
lena_breakdown.lena_msg: coming over. pack a bag, you sleep at my place. no debate.
lena_breakdown.scratch_note: 🛋 Lucy took me in · +30⚡ +70 comfort · day lost

father.reason: minus $1500. this isn't a «rough month» anymore, this is a crisis.
father.body: need to stabilize fast. who do you call?
father.mama_msg: Dad's on his way. picking you up for a couple days. this isn't a fail, it's a pause.
father.scratch_note: 🏡 parents helped · cash $200 · +15 comfort · you're safe

paragraphs: in the first week Chris matched with you on Hinge. persistent, a little too much — but under the dinner invites there was genuine patience.
you ghosted for a while, then went «just to see». just didn't happen.
he'd drop off food when you couldn't leave the apartment. listened when you vented about the landlady, the IRS review, the projects on fire. didn't try to save you — just stayed close.
six months in, you moved in together. he said «let's try». you said «let's».

a year in, you opened a studio called «Marina AI» — automation for small businesses: leads, funnels, inbound, AI support. Lucy brought the first three clients. Anna scaled her two-pager into a full site — took it. Tim handed you his tiered methodology and helped you hire a team.

two years in — office in Dumbo, six people on payroll, $40k/mo MRR, three anchor corporate clients. Chris quit his day job and became CTO of your studio. you stopped splitting «mine» and «yours» — it's all one pile now.
today's saturday. you're at your favorite café by the window in Williamsburg. peonies on the table — from him, no reason. he's laughing at something you said, you're laughing back.
you remember that day 1 when the battery was at 20% and nobody wrote. now the battery is full, everyone writes, and you pick who to reply to.
love.quiet_line: this isn't an ending. this is your life, become the real thing.

eviction: by the end of the month the money didn't stretch. dad drove in, took you back to long island.
mum met you with a pie and a hug. didn't say a word about work.
the old curtain in the kitchen from when you were a kid. you cried for the first time all month.
this isn't failure — it's a pause. next run you'll be smarter.
no_traction: maybe content-studio isn't your lane. or the timing was wrong.
this isn't failure — it's information. about yourself, the market, what doesn't work.
burnout: you made it to day 30, but didn't finish the projects.
comfort hit zero, body tapped out. Lucy booked you a flight to amsterdam for the weekend.
in the morning mum texted: «i know you're tired. i'm here».
the first month is always the most brutal. you survived. that's already a win.

prompt.name: What should we call you in the link? (optional)

tim.share_lose: this isn't the end. show someone who'd recognize themselves here.
tim.share_rescue: you're hanging in. show one person.
tim.share_win: you made it. rare. show someone.
tim.share_first_project: first project shipped. show a friend — she needs to see this right now.
tim.share_end_of_day: another day survived. show a friend — she's going through it too.
tim.share_default: send this to one friend. not your feed. one person.

challenge.hero_lose: 🔥 {name} burned out on day {d}. Can you last longer?
challenge.hero_rescue: 🚨 {name} was saved on day {d}. Will someone save you?
challenge.hero_default: 🎁 {name} made it to day {d}. Can you go further?

tip.day: Day {day} of {max}. Month ends day {max} — need ≥3 projects delivered, cash≥0, energy≥25, hunger≥30, comfort≥20.
tip.hours: It's {clock}. Marina's day: 9am → 11pm (14 real hours = 8 work slots). When slots end — hit «end day».
tip.cash: Marina's cash. Start $500. Every day −$45 passive + rent $500 (day 10/20) + unavoidable expenses ($60/$80/$150/$100). Below −$1500 — eviction.
tip.rent_ok: Next rent: $500 due day {rentDay}. {daysLeft} days left. ✓ covered.
tip.rent_short: Next rent: $500 due day {rentDay}. {daysLeft} days left. Short ${shortBy} — earn or close a deal.
tip.energy: Energy (0-100). Drops from work and bad sleep. Recovers overnight (fully only if you ate). Below 25 at finale = lose.
tip.hunger: Hunger (0-100). Each day −30. Below 50 — work slows. Below 30 — energy drops. Hunger=0 day 4+ — Marina collapses. Eat home (−$15) or cafe (−$35).
tip.comfort: Comfort / mood (0-100). Each day −10. Below 35 — impulse buys. Below 5 day 15+ — breakdown risk. Shopping, cafe, friends (Denis) raise it.
tip.bank_locked: Account under IRS 1099 review (suspicious transaction flagged). All purchases blocked: food, offers, shopping. Wait {daysLeft} days for unlock.

kirill_conflict.leave: maybe we did rush this… · 💔 break up with kirill

nastya_partnership.maybe: i'll think about it · keep the option
nastya_partnership.decline: no, i can handle it solo
